items.name_en: Fendi Medium with Strap
items.name_cn:
Fendi Medium with Strap
Monogram Tote "Sunshine Tote"
Classic double F monogram body, amber-colored double handles are the biggest focal point of the bag. Holding it by one handle gives a strong presence and doesn't dig into the hand. The overall vintage feel is super strong, very suitable for fashionistas who love vintage style. Highly recommended!
83294B Size 35x17x31cm

items.name_en: Fendi Mini By The Way logo Monogram, Chantilly material, tortoiseshell handle. The capacity is impressive, can hold a phone and daily small items. Has a shoulder strap/shoulder carry/hand carry. A top choice for an autumn/winter small bag.
items.name_cn:
Fendi Mini By The Way logo Monogram, Chantilly material, tortoiseshell handle. The capacity is impressive, can hold a phone and daily small items. Has a shoulder strap/shoulder carry/hand carry. A top choice for an autumn/winter small bag.
Search number: 801
Size 17x18x8cm. m48

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_en: FENDI New Mini ByTheWay Mini Bag
items.name_cn:
FENDI New Mini ByTheWay Mini Bag
The bag features a clean and simple silhouette ByTheWay combined with tortoiseshell handles and other personality elements, a very cute mini. The smooth calfskin color presents classic and delicate variations, making it even more playful. This sporty fashion mini bag is suitable for carrying from day to night, can be crossbody with a detachable mini strap, or carried directly by hand. Although small, it has excellent capacity 👻
Dimensions 17x18x8cm067

items.name_en: FENDI's latest crescent🌙 shoulder bag is shipping first! The FENDI O'Lock debuts in the world of leather goods. Inspired by the 90s with a minimalist cut, it has the perfect underarm fit, a current trend!
items.name_cn:
FENDI's latest crescent🌙 shoulder bag is shipping first! The FENDI O'Lock debuts in the world of leather goods. Inspired by the 90s with a minimalist cut, it has the perfect underarm fit, a current trend!
Made of cowhide, original hardware, zip closure, featuring a gold metal Fendi Roma logo. Capacity fits daily essentials for a fairy🧚. Includes handles: a detachable full-leather handle and a handle with a metal large O'Lock logo and crystal-effect acrylic chain, for hand or shoulder carry!
Model: 329# Size: 32X11X5CM
188021

items.name_en: Fendi❤️First series features the letter F as a design highlight, fine calfskin weaving, and a diagonal frame silhouette. The design is unique and innovative with an asymmetrical shape, stylish and sharp. It can be used as a clutch, and the detachable shoulder strap allows it to be worn as a shoulder bag, making it perfect for hand-holding. Multi-functional, soft leather with a great feel.
items.name_cn:
Fendi❤️First series features the letter F as a design highlight, fine calfskin weaving, and a diagonal frame silhouette. The design is unique and innovative with an asymmetrical shape, stylish and sharp. It can be used as a clutch, and the detachable shoulder strap allows it to be worn as a shoulder bag, making it perfect for hand-holding. Multi-functional, soft leather with a great feel.
Dimensions 24*9*18 128F
Style 129 Weave

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_en: First, see the caramel color flat lay. Exclusive original factory 'mouse goods', you can confidently buy from our B channel. items.name_en: First, see the flat lay real shot! How popular is the Baguette bag? It's known by everyone online. Major brands are scrambling to imitate their own versions of the Baguette style, with LV, GG, and Fd being the most representative. BBR certainly won't be outdone and has designed its own version of the Baguette!

items.name_en: Flamenco Satchel - Crossbody Bag [Tobacco Brown]
items.name_cn:
Flamenco Satchel - Crossbody Bag [Tobacco Brown]
Reimagining the classic Flamenco into a practical crossbody bag,
Suede leather, smooth Nappa leather lining (Full leather inside and out)
Fits laptops under 14 inches💻, a blessing for stylish business commuters~
Dimensions: 34-14-24cm
Code: 26660

items.name_en: Flash sale! Brand new! No defects! No returns, no shipping. No box or packaging
items.name_cn:
Flash sale! Brand new! No defects! No returns, no shipping. No box or packaging
Large Irapala palm fiber and calfskin 🐂
basket handbag
Lots of celebrities have this
A traditional basket handbag
Features a classic hand-woven tubular calfskin strap and a calfskin 🐽🐽 embossed patch
This smaller size is made from Irapala palm, a palm tree grown, harvested, and sun-dried in Colombia, then woven by female artisans guided by fair trade principles at Corporación Oficio y Arte
Due to handcrafting, dimensions may vary slightly, making each purchase unique!
A summer essential woven bag. If you have to choose one bag for summer 👛, it must be a woven bag
Suitable for daily wear and weekend outings, instantly bringing the summer vibe
Anagram basket handbag. A classic hand-woven basket bag. Just throw it on for a vacation look ◇ A summer must-have
Size: 46cm~24cm~15cm
